fundamentals.name: ON Semiconductor Corporation
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: ON Semiconductor Corporation provides intelligent sensing and power solutions in Hong Kong, Singapore, the United Kingdom, the United States, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Power Solutions Group, Analog and Mixed-Signal Group, and Intelligent Sensing Group. The Power Solutions Group segment offers discrete, module, and integrated semiconductor devices designed to enable power conversion, including power switching, signal conditioning, and circuit protection technologies. Its Analog and Mixed-Signal Group segment designs and develops analog and mixed-signal solutions, including power management, sensor interface, connectivity, and standard products for automotive, industrial automation, AI data centers, computing, and mobile end markets. The Intelligent Sensing Group segment develops complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor image sensors, image signal processors, short-wave infrared sensors, and other products, as well as photon-counting technologies, including single-photon avalanche diode arrays and silicon photomultiplier devices for depth sensing, factory automation, safety systems, and robotics industries. ON Semiconductor Corporation was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

judgment.summary: ON Semiconductor shows strong growth estimates and robust cash flow, but carries a high trailing valuation and modest current profitability metrics.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus by 4.1%; next earnings date is 2026-08-03.
positives: Analyst growth estimates are strong at 34.8% for the current quarter and 31.5% for the fiscal year.
Free cash flow of $1.28B TTM supports significant buyback programs.
Strong liquidity with a current ratio of 4.87 and quick ratio of 2.80.
Gross margin of 42.7% indicates pricing power in its products.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 94.29 is exceptionally high, suggesting significant future growth is already priced in.
Return on equity at 7.5% and return on assets at 6.8% are moderate.
Total debt of $3.25B is higher than total cash of $2.40B.
The mean analyst target of $103.97 is below the current spot price, despite a consensus 'buy' rating.

news.paragraph: ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON) has seen significant positive momentum, with its stock up nearly 10% in the past week and analysts at 24/7 Wall St. predicting a new all-time high this year. Mizuho maintained an "Outperform" rating, and Simply Wall St. highlighted record cash flow, a $6 billion buyback, and a push into GaN technology as potential catalysts. The company recently beat Q1 2026 EPS estimates, with the next earnings date set for August 3rd.
